name: Write ZITADEL YAML Config
description: Writes zitadel.yaml, zitadel.smtp.yaml and zitadel.init.yaml into the `config` managed volume before LXC start. Replaces the old approach of configuring Zitadel through ~40 ZITADEL_* compose env vars plus the conf-strip-empty-smtp sed hack. Runs after volume creation (150) and before SSL enable (159) so the SSL addon can patch the on-volume zitadel.yaml.
